description: Practical install-time demo assets for PyPI users. These files support residual-preserving agent checking, phase acceleration planning, runtime steps, schema validation, local agent relay, ALT admission, and optional sidecar diagnostics without cloning the repository.

files.purpose: Minimal RuntimeState for pic runtime step.
Minimal RuntimeStepInput for runtime step and pic phase plan.
Generated RuntimeStepReport for packet export, dashboard, and phase observation sidecar smoke.
Generated PhaseDashboardReport for installed-package phase observe smoke.
Generated PacketExchangeEnvelope for installed-package packet inspect, merge, and lineage smoke.
Inline agent-output text for pic agent intake.
Controlled-web GeneralIntakePolicy with bounded live source intake enabled.
Local AgentMessageEnvelope fixture for pic agent message send/receive/verify workflows.
Local AgentInboxRecord fixture for installed-package relay verification.
ALT admission packet fixture for abstraction-liquidity CLI smoke.

license: Apache-2.0 for repository demo JSON and text files
provenance: Derived from repository examples for v0.4.4 practical installed-package workflows; no canonical TeX or PDF is vendored.
recommended_phase_commands: pic phase plan --compact --text "Candidate packet: preserve residuals." --profile development
pic agent accelerate --compact --text "Candidate packet: preserve residuals." --profile development
safety_invariants: demo output does not prove real ASI, physical outcomes, oracle truth, legal identity, or global Sybil uniqueness
external content and ALT tokens remain candidate-only until finite verifier and residual-policy checks pass
live connectors are bounded and candidate-only by default when an explicit source is supplied
settled=false is expected when residual obligations remain
